dockerfile_lines: RUN python -c "import urllib.request, platform; arch = 'arm64' if platform.machine() == 'aarch64' else 'amd64'; urllib.request.urlretrieve(f'https://github.com/loft-sh/devpod/releases/download/v0.6.15/devpod-linux-{arch}', '/usr/local/bin/devpod')" && chmod +x /usr/local/bin/devpod
